description: The Mercedes-AMG C63, produced from 2008, is the high-performance C-Class. The W204 generation's naturally aspirated 6.2-litre V8 producing 451-507 bhp is the most characterful, while the W205's 4.0-litre twin-turbo V8 offered 469-510 bhp. The 507 Edition and Black Series are the most sought-after.
